units.title: My Body - Part 2
units.subtitle: Arms, Legs, Hands, Feet and Actions

lessons.title: Move Your Body
lessons.topic: Main limbs and the grammar of commands

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What body part do you shake in the song?
questions.hint: It's between your stomach and legs.

questions.question_text: Which body part do you stomp with?
What do you wave with to say hello?
questions.hint: You can wear a glove on it.

items.definition: At the end of your arm

steps.title: Ella's Fun Day
steps.text: Hi! I am Ella. I have two strong legs. I can stomp my feet. Clap your hands with me. Let's play!

questions.question: How many legs does Ella have?

steps.explanation: Use 'Clap your' to ask for clapping.

steps.audio_text: Hi kids! Let's play a game. Touch your arms and then clap your hands. Can you do that with me?

questions.question: What should you do after touching your arms?

steps.prompt: Action: Can you say 'Touch your arm'?

questions.question_text: Touch your ___ to wave hello. (Grammar question)
Which picture shows a foot? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: You can clap with your feet.
What do you do with your legs? (Reading comprehension question)

lessons.title: Ten Fingers
lessons.topic: Small body parts and plural review

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to hear music?
questions.hint: They are on the side of your head.

questions.question_text: Which part helps you smell flowers?
questions.hint: It's in the middle of your face.

questions.question_text: What do you use to kick a ball?
questions.hint: They are at the end of your legs.

items.example: Touch your finger to your nose.
I have a long jump rope.

items.definition: Not big from end to end

steps.title: Wiggle and Clap!
steps.text: Wiggle your fingers! I have ten fingers. Clap your hands! I have ten toes. My toes are short. Touch your toes and smile.

questions.question: How many fingers do they have?
What should you do after touching your toes?

steps.explanation: We say "are" for more than one.

steps.audio_text: Clap your hands and wiggle your toes. Can you count how many fingers are on one hand?

questions.question: How many fingers are on one hand?

questions.question_text: How many fingers do you have on both hands? (Reading comprehension)
Which word means 'short'? (Vocabulary question)
Fingers are ___. (Grammar question)
True or False: A toe is on your hand.
Which body part is not mentioned in the lesson? (Vocabulary question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to clap your hands together?
Which helps you run fast and jump high?
What part of your body lets you nod up and down?
questions.hint: It's on top of your neck!

steps.title: Dance with Me!
steps.text: Clap your hands and say, 'I have two hands!' Stomp your feet and shout, 'I have two feet!' Touch your knees and shoulders. Great job, everyone!

questions.question: What do you do with your feet?
How many hands do you have?

steps.audio_text: Hello children! Let’s get moving! Clap your hands three times. Now jump up high and shout, 'I have feet!'

questions.question: How many times do you clap your hands?
What do you shout after jumping?

questions.question_text: Touch your ______. (Vocabulary question)
What do you 'clap' together? (Vocabulary question)
'Stomp your feet.' What does 'stomp' mean? (Grammar question)
Is it correct: 'Jump your knees.'? (Grammar question)
Reading: Find the action - 'She claps and stomps.' What is she doing?

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What body part lets you see pretty colors?
questions.hint: You open these to look at the world.

questions.question_text: Which body part do you use to jump high?
questions.hint: You find these at the bottom of your body.

questions.question_text: What body part helps you smell flowers?
questions.hint: It's in the middle of your face and helps you breathe.

steps.title: Super Day with My Body
steps.text: I have two eyes and a nose. I can see the sky. Touch your nose! I have ten toes. I can stomp my feet. My hands can clap. Touch your shoulders!

questions.question: How many toes does the character have?
What can the character do with hands?

steps.audio_text: Hello! I have a shiny green jacket and I love to jump around. Watch me touch my nose and wiggle my fingers!

questions.question: What does he love to do?

steps.prompt: Say: 'I have two feet and two legs.'
steps.expected_text: i have two feet and two legs

questions.question_text: Touch your ___ - It's where you smell flowers. (Vocabulary question)
I ___ two hands and two feet. (Grammar question)
Which action means to clap? (Reading comprehension question)
True or False: 'Stomp your feet' means to jump.
Where do you wear a hat? (Vocabulary question)
